ddls:
CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "cyclomatic_complexity" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity of the method */,
  "npath_complexity" INTEGER /* NPath complexity of the method */,
  "sequence_coverage" REAL /* Sequence coverage percentage of the method */,
  "branch_coverage" REAL /* Branch coverage percentage of the method */,
  "crap_score" REAL /* CRAP score of the method */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file where the method is defined */,
  "lines_of_code" INTEGER /* Number of lines of code in the method */,
  "code_smell_count" INTEGER /* Number of code smells detected in the method */,
  "technical_debt_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of technical debt in the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of the method (e.g., static, instance, constructor) */,
  "last_refactored_date" TEXT /* Date when the method was last refactored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module the file belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the file was last updated */,
  "lines_of_code" INTEGER /* Total number of lines of code in the file */,
  "code_smell_count" INTEGER /* Number of code smells detected in the file */,
  "technical_debt_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of technical debt in the file */,
  "last_refactored_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was last refactored */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the module belongs to */,
  "lines_of_code" INTEGER /* Total number of lines of code in the module */,
  "code_smell_count" INTEGER /* Number of code smells detected in the module */,
  "technical_debt_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of technical debt in the module */,
  "last_refactored_date" TEXT /* Date when the module was last refactored */,
  "module_type" TEXT /* Type of the module (e.g., core, utility, service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lines_of_code" INTEGER /* Total number of lines of code in the project */,
  "code_smell_count" INTEGER /* Number of code smells detected in the project */,
  "technical_debt_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of technical debt in the project */,
  "last_refactored_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last refactored */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date the commit was made */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the commit */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file that was committed */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of commit (e.g., feature, bug fix, refactor) */,
  "commit_size" INTEGER /* Size of the commit in bytes */,
  "files_changed" INTEGER /* Number of files changed in the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the project */,
  "commit_count" INTEGER /* Total number of commits made by the author */,
  "code_smell_count" INTEGER /* Number of code smells introduced by the author */,
  "technical_debt_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of technical debt introduced by the author */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit made by the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code review */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commit being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  "review_size" INTEGER /* Size of the review in bytes */,
  "files_reviewed" INTEGER /* Number of files reviewed */,
  "code_smell_count" INTEGER /* Number of code smells detected during the review */,
  "technical_debt_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of technical debt detected during the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the reviewer in the project */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews conducted by the reviewer */,
  "code_smell_count" INTEGER /* Number of code smells detected by the reviewer */,
  "technical_debt_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of technical debt detected by the reviewer */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last review conducted by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical metric entry */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metrics were recorded */,
  "cyclomatic_complexity" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity at that date */,
  "npath_complexity" INTEGER /* NPath complexity at that date */,
  "sequence_coverage" REAL /* Sequence coverage percentage at that date */,
  "branch_coverage" REAL /* Branch coverage percentage at that date */,
  "crap_score" REAL /* CRAP score at that date */,
  "lines_of_code" INTEGER /* Number of lines of code in the method at that date */,
  "code_smell_count" INTEGER /* Number of code smells detected in the method at that date */,
  "technical_debt_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of technical debt in the method at that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_history_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., complexity, coverage) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., lines, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refactor_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Description of the refactoring recommendation */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the recommendation */,
  "recommended_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer who recommended the refactoring */,
  "date_recommended" TEXT /* Date when the refactoring was recommended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refactor_recommendations_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refactor_recommendations_recommended_by FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_by") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the company */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the user accessed reports */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date of the last access to a report */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Preferred type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "standard_value" REAL /* Value of the standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., complexity, coverage) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., lines, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)
